title: centrosema sericiflorum
intro: Centrosema sericiflorum, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a tropical plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Centrosema sericiflorum include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Centrosema sericiflorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
